---
name: Task
about: A concrete piece of work with clear scope and acceptance criteria
title: "[Task] <short descriptive title>"
labels: ["type: enhancement", "priority:P2", "size:S"]
assignees: []
---

## Goal
<!-- What will be true when this is done? State the end-user or developer-visible outcome. -->
- 

## Rationale
<!-- Why this matters (user value, stability, or developer experience). Keep it brief. -->
- 

## Scope
<!-- Boundaries of this task. What’s in and what’s out? Avoid solution details here. -->
In scope:
- 
Out of scope:
- 

## Plan
<!-- List concrete steps to complete this task. If multiple owners, note them. -->
- [ ] Step 1
- [ ] Step 2
- [ ] Step 3

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- Convert the Goal into verifiable checks. These must pass for the task to be considered done. -->
- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

## Risk
<!-- Risk level (low/medium/high) and mitigation ideas. -->
Level: low | medium | high  
Mitigations:
- 

## Impacted Areas
<!-- Apply appropriate labels such as: area:core, area:gui, area:data, area:utils, area:build, area:ci, area:docs -->
- area: 

## Dependencies
<!-- Other issues/PRs that must be finished first or are blocked by this task. Use #<id> references. -->
- Blocks: 
- Blocked by: 

## Testing
<!-- How will you verify this? Unit/integration/smoke tests, manual steps, or screenshots/logs. -->
- 

## Definition of Done
- [ ] All Acceptance Criteria are met
- [ ] CI passes (build + lint/tests if applicable)
- [ ] Docs updated (CLAUDE.md/README/ROADMAP) if needed
- [ ] No regressions observed in impacted areas
- [ ] Added or updated tests where appropriate

## Notes
<!-- Links to context: prior discussions, logs, screenshots, design docs. -->
-
